topics.topic_title: VIHANDE VYAVILEMU MULIFUCHI (Cultural Values in the Nation)

sub_topics.title: KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA - Shimutwilo: Chivwasano
competences: Zachisa lilimi lyakwoloka kushimutwila havihande vyakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi)

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavali valivwasane nge umwe ali nakulanjisa chola chenyi mukwavo nawa ali nakutonda kuchilanda.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila hachihande chakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi)
Alweze valongi vambulule vyuma vanashimutwila
Shimutwila navalongi halumbunwiso yachivwasano
Zachisa mitwe yavihande yapandama kuchiyoyelo chavalongi jove
Valongi vatela kulivwilila nge mukwavo ali nakuhanjika
Mazu awa atela kupandama kuchihande chavyuma vyavilemu mulifuchi
learner_steps: Vashimutwile hachihande chakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi)
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chihande echi nacheulula valongi mwakushimutwila navakwavo havihande vyakusefuka mujingalila regarding cultural values in the nation.

sub_topics.short_notes: This section introduces learners to conversation and dialogue (Chivwasano) about cultural values in the nation through structured listening and speaking activities.

questions: Hula valongi vashimutwile hachihande chakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi)
Hula valongi vambulule vyuma vanashimtwila hachihande chakusefuka mujingalila (vihande vyavilemu mulifuchi)

sub_topics.title: KUTANGA - Mazu: Lumbunwiso yamazu
competences: Valongi vatela kuzachisa mazu akulita naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavuluke lizu lyalipika na 'kumina.'
teacher_steps: Ahane mazu kuli valongi
Alweze valongi kushimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu navahane
Alweze valongi kulumbununa mazu
Alweze valongi kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila mukutunga mikuku
learner_steps: Vashimutwile mazu akusakula vanavahane kuli mulongeshi
Valongi vatunge mikuku kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Mazu akulipika: Words with similar meanings. Examples: Kumina - Kufwiza (to stand), Kwingila – kulovoka (to enter). Students explore synonyms and word meanings in Luvale.

instructional_blocks.hook: Tanga chimbwa chamujimbu nakulamuna kaha hula valongi vambulule chihande chivene chili muchimbwa unatange.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mijimbu yakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula
Alweze valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi kusononona mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
Valongi vatange nakulamuna
Valongi vatela kusolola chinyingi chakuthachikiza mikingo mukutanga chavo
Kavatela kukikichila mukutanga mazu
Vatela kwivwishisa mujimbu nakukumbulula vihula
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Reading comprehension passage: KUSAKULA CHAKUKUPUKA - The story of Mukumbi, a student who found a lost exam paper and demonstrated honesty by returning it to the teacher instead of using it to cheat. This teaches moral values of integrity and honesty.

instructional_blocks.hook: Mulongeshi asoneke mukuku halivaya nakulweza longi umwe atange uze mukuku helu.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatangile helu, washiwashi nakulamuna
Alweze valongi kukumbulula vihula mukuhanjika
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kutanga nakulamuna: Fluent reading practice. Chapwa kutanga mujimbu kanawa chakuzeneka kukikichila. Students practice reading aloud with proper pronunciation and fluency.

sub_topics.short_notes: This reading section covers vocabulary development (Lumbunwiso yamazu), comprehension (Kutanga Nakwivwishisa), and fluent reading (Kutangila helu). Students learn word meanings, read for understanding, and develop oral reading fluency.

questions: Kumbulula vihula vyamiyachi yakulihandununa kufuma hamujimbu
Hana mujimbu kuli valongi vatangile helu nakulamuna

sub_topics.title: KUSONEKA - Chaulo chakulumbununa

instructional_blocks.hook: Nge wapwanga nakufuma kushikola hinauya kwimbo. Kuheta hakachi hinauwana mukwenu mukashikola vanakumupika kuli lunga. Kumushishika uze lunga, asolokanga kupwa mwenyembo oloze lijina kulithachikiza chiku. Vyuma muka watela kuvuluka mangana vikafweko vakwenu kuthachiza uze lunga?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
Alweze valongi kusoneka chaulo chakulumbununa
Eulula valongi hatuthachikijilo twa chaulo chakulumbununa
Lweza valongi kuzachisa mazu nawapandama kuvilyo vangu jitanu (chivangu chakwivwa, chivangu chakumakila, chivangu chakumona, chivangu chakukwata, chivangu chalivumba)
Vazachise mazu atulumbunwiso nalingiso mukulumbununa
Vanahase nawa kuzachisa hanjikiso yakujimina
learner_steps: Vashimutwile walo natuthachikilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chaulo chakulumbununa (Descriptive composition about people). Structure: Chimbwa 1 (Introduction: name, age, country, family), Chimbwa 2 (Physical description using senses), Chimbwa 3 (School background), Chimbwa 4 (Hobbies/interests), Chimbwa 5 (Conclusion - personality summary)

sub_topics.short_notes: This writing section teaches descriptive composition about people, using sensory details and structured paragraphs. Students learn to write compositions describing individuals using the five senses.

questions: Hula valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulumbununa

sub_topics.title: MWAYA LILIMI - Kutunga Mazu: Afikizesheni

instructional_blocks.hook: Chihandwa muka chili hatuputu ava vali kumazu awa; na-kulya na ngwa-kulya.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune lumbunwiso namulimo wa afikizesheni
Alweze valongi kutombola miyachi yama afikisi
Alweze valongi kuhandununa ji afikisi kwesekesa namiyachi yajo
Alweze valongi kutunga mazu kuzachisa ji afikisi
learner_steps: Vahandunune ji afikisi kwesekesa namiyachi yajo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Afikizesheni yapwa jila yakutungilamo mazu amahya kuzachisa tuputu, tuthomu natusulo. Examples: KUSANA + na- = Nakusana (prefix), KWIMANA + -nyi- = Kwimanyina (infix), KWENDA + -nga = Kwendanga (suffix)

instructional_blocks.hook: Kakoma vamulwezanga kuli naye ngwavo songoyenyi nelava hamujimba. Hanjikiso yakwilava hamujimba yalumbununa ika?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso nazachiso yatushilikilo
Lweza valongi vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Lweza valongi vatombole tushilikilo twakuzachisa mujila jimwe
Alweze valongi vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
learner_steps: Vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Tushilikilo (Idioms) - figurative expressions. Mazu veji kuzachisanga mutushilikilo akwechi lumbununwiso yacho yakulihandunuka. See Form 1 Term 1 teaching module for detailed examples of tushilikilo.

sub_topics.short_notes: Language structure covering affixation (Afikizesheni) and idioms (Tushilikilo). Students learn to create new words using prefixes, infixes, and suffixes, and understand figurative language through idiomatic expressions.

vocabulary.definition: Affixation - the process of adding affixes to words
Prefix - affix added at the beginning
Infix - affix inserted in the middle
Suffix - affix added at the end

questions: Vahandunune ji afikisi kweseka namiyachi yajo

sub_topics.title: KWALUMUNA MUJIMBU - Jijila Jakwalumwinamo
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufumisa mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Longi umwe ahanjike mukuku mulilimi limwe kaha vakwavo valumune uze mukuku mulilimi likwavo.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kweseka najila jakwalumwinamo
Atela kweulula valongi hajijila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
Anukisa valongi kwanuka jila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Translation methods (Jijila Jakwalumwinamo Mujimbu). Students learn various techniques for translating between English and Luvale while maintaining meaning and cultural context.

sub_topics.short_notes: This section develops translation skills, teaching learners various methods of translating texts between Luvale and English using different translation techniques.

sub_topics.title: KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA - Kushimutwila
competences: Kuhandununa muchano kufuma kuvishinganyeka mukushimutwila, muvihanjijeka chipwe mumanyau

instructional_blocks.hook: Kalunga ikhiye thengi yetu. Mazu kana muchano nyi vishinganyeka?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vahandunune muchano kufuma kuvishinganyeka
Alweze valongi vahane muchano navishinganyeka
Kutangisa muchano navishinganyeka
Kuhandununa muchano navishinganyeka
Kuhana vinjikizo vyamijimbu yamuchano navishinganyeka
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Muchano chuma chize vatachikiza chipwe unjiho uze vanamono ngwavo wamwenemwene. Vishinganyeka vyapwa vize vyuma mwajina chipwe mwafwelela muthu ivene.

sub_topics.short_notes: This topic explores the distinction between truth (muchano) - verifiable factual information, and beliefs (vishinganyeka) - personal convictions or faith. Students develop critical thinking skills.

vocabulary.definition: Truth - factual information that can be verified

sub_topics.title: KUTANGA - Mazu: Kulumbununa Mazu

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vawane lizu lyalifwana nalumbunwiso yalizu 'muveji'.
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu vanasakula
Lweza valongi vahane lumbunwiso yamazu
Lweza valongi vazachise mazu vanasakula mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Word meanings and vocabulary development focusing on descriptive words and their usage in context.

instructional_blocks.hook: Lweza valongi vatange chimbwa chamujimbu washiwashi. Hula valongi vihula kweseka nachimbwa vanatange.
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vatange mijimbu chipwe mikanda yaseteko yavo
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula vyakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi kuhihisa mujimbu
Alweze valongi vasononone mijimbu vanatange
Alweza valongi vashimutwila lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka naseteko yavo
learner_steps: Vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka naseteko yavo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Reading comprehension: ULEMU WASHINGO - Story about Shingo and Livoko, teaching about honesty and the consequences of greed. Shingo receives a magical calabash that produces food.

instructional_blocks.hook: Jijila muka tunahase kuwanyinamo chinyingi?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mikanda yakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange mukuhanjika
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Extensive reading practice - students read various texts and summarize orally to develop comprehension and speaking skills.

sub_topics.short_notes: Reading section covering vocabulary, intensive reading comprehension through folk tales, and extensive reading practice with oral summarization.

sub_topics.title: KUSONEKA - Kuhihisa Mujimbu

instructional_blocks.hook: Valongi vavuluke mukanda wavuluka vihanjijeka vyakalunga.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile tuthachikijilo twamujimbu muchimbwa
Alweze valongi vatombole mazu amalemu ali mumujimbu wakusoneka
Alweze valongi kuhihisa mujimbu muchimbwa
Zamikisa mwakusonekela vimbwa vyamazu
Lweza valongi vasoneke vimbwa muwihi
Lweza valongi kusononona vimbwa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Summary writing in paragraphs. Students learn to condense longer texts into concise summaries while maintaining key information.

sub_topics.short_notes: This writing section teaches summary composition (Kuhihisa mujimbu muchimbwa), focusing on identifying main ideas and writing concise paragraph summaries.

questions: Hula valongi kushimutwila tuthachikijilo mwakuhihishila mijimbu muchimbwa
Valongi vatombole visonejeka vyavilemu nakuvihihisa muchimbwa

sub_topics.title: MWAYA LILIMI - Hanjikilo na Ambulwilo

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mukuku wamazu ou; 'Mama angulwezanga kuya kumande zau,' Kayombo ahanjikile. Hula valongi vasononone mukuku ou kuputuka na: Naye …………
teacher_steps: ALweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso namilimo yahanjikilo
Alweze valongi vatombole mikuku yahanjikilo mumijimbu
Alweze valongi vahake mikingo mumikuku ili mu hanjikilo
Alweze valongi kutunga mikuku nayisolola hanjikilo
learner_steps: Vahake mikingo mumikuku ili mu hanjikilo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Hanjikilo (Direct speech): Kwambulula mazu vahanjikanga kuli muthu kuzachisa mazu vene aze azachisanga muthu. Examples: 'Lwola muka naupwa hembo?' Ahulishile. 'Kangweshi nakukwivwishisako,' ngwenyi Wana.

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vatongole vishimo vejiva nakuvilumbununa.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso nazachiso yavishimo
Alweze valongi vahandunune vishimo kweseka namilimo yavyo
Alweze valongi vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Alweze valongi vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
learner_steps: Vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Vishimo (Similes) - figurative comparisons using 'like' or 'as'. Students learn to identify and use similes in various contexts.

sub_topics.short_notes: Language structure covering direct speech (Hanjikilo), indirect speech (Ambulwilo), and similes (Vishimo). Students learn to convert between speech forms and use figurative language.

questions: Valongi navatombola nakuhandununa nakweseka namilimo yavyo

sub_topics.title: KWALUMUNA MUJIMBU - Jijila Jakwalumwinamo
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mazu mulilimi limwe hali papilo chipwe halivaya mangana valongi vawalumune.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa nge (lizu halizu, kushishisa, mazu akulevana, mazu akulomba, kuyambula)
Shindakanya jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu
learner_steps: Valumune mujimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa nge (lizu halizu, kushishisa, mazu akulevana, mazu akulomba, kuyambula)
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Translation using various methods: word-for-word (lizu halizu), literal translation (kushishisa), equivalent words (mazu akulevana), borrowing (mazu akulomba), and adaptation (kuyambula).

sub_topics.short_notes: Advanced translation techniques between English and Luvale, teaching various methods including word-for-word, literal, equivalent, borrowing, and adaptive translation.

questions: Valongi valumune mijimbu mwavahana mulongeshi kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa kufuma mulilimi limwe nakutwala mulilimi likwavo

sub_topics.title: KWIVWILILA NA KUHANJIKA - Chihanjika

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vambulule nge vapwako lyehi kuchihela khala kwakukungulukila vathu vavavulu. Vahule mangana vambulule ovyo vyuma vyalingishile numba vathu khana vakunguluke kuchihela khana.
teacher_steps: Valweze valongi vakungulule unjiho hamutwe wachihande unavahane
Lweza valongi vahanjike kulikungumbuwa hamutwe wachihande unavahane
Kavatela kutala hamavuko oloze watela kutala vathu hameso
Watela kuhanjika nalizu lyakukangwoka
Watela kuwana unjiho wauvulu hamutwe wachihande wakuhanjikaho
learner_steps: Vakungulule unjiho hakhala mutwe wachihande vanavahane
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kuhanjika Kulikungumbuwa: Speaking to large audiences on important topics. Topics may include: educational content, entertainment, or social issues. Key skills: eye contact, clear voice, thorough topic knowledge.

sub_topics.short_notes: This section develops public speaking skills, teaching learners to research topics, prepare presentations, and deliver speeches confidently to large audiences.

vocabulary.definition: Public speaking - speaking to large groups

questions: Hanjika kuli vakwenu haluyanjisa lwa vanyike

sub_topics.title: KUTANGA - Mazu: Kulumbununa Mazu

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi valumbunune lizu lya 'mwanauta'.
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu vanasakula
Lweza valongi vahane lumbunwiso yamazu
Lweza valongi vazachise mazu vanasakula mumikuku
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lumbunwiso yamajina mu Luvale - Names in Luvale have meanings. Examples: Mukwetunga (One who builds), Mwanauta (Child of the bow/hunter), Mukupelo (Gift/blessing).

instructional_blocks.hook: Lweza valongi vatange chimbwa chamujimbu washiwashi. Hula valongi vihula kweseka nachimbwa vanatange.
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vatange mijimbu chipwe mikanda yaseteko yavo
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula vyakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi kuhihisa mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vasononone mijimbu vanatange
Alweza valongi vashimutwila lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka naseteko yavo
learner_steps: Vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu kweseka naseteko yavo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Folk tale comprehension. Story features a greedy animal (chinyanga) learning a lesson about honesty and consequences of greed.

instructional_blocks.hook: Kusoneka mazu halivaya nakulweza valongi vawatangile helu.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatangile helu washi-washi nakulamuna
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Fluent reading practice with proper pronunciation and expression.

sub_topics.short_notes: Reading section covering meaningful names in Luvale culture, folk tale comprehension teaching moral lessons, and fluent reading practice.

vocabulary.definition: Child of the bow/hunter - name meaning

sub_topics.title: KUSONEKA - Chaulo chakulumbununa

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vavuluke tunyama vatwama navo hamembo avo. Hula longi umwe alumbunune kanyama uze valama hembo lyavo.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulumbununa
Alweze valongi kusoneka chaulo chakulumbununa
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Descriptive composition about animals. Structure: Chimbwa 1 (Name, habitat), Chimbwa 2 (Physical appearance), Chimbwa 3 (Habitat details), Chimbwa 4 (Diet and behavior), Chimbwa 5 (Conclusion - importance/values).

sub_topics.short_notes: Descriptive writing about animals, teaching students to organize information about wildlife using structured paragraphs and sensory details.

sub_topics.title: MWAYA LILIMI - Hanjikilo na Ambulwilo; Tushilikilo

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mukuku wamazu ou halivaya; Chinyemba ambanga ngwenyi nge mwawana mali, mwalanda ngombe yenyi. Hula valongi vasononone mukuku ou kuputuka na: Chinyemba ambanga ngwenyi, '…………………………………………….'
teacher_steps: Lweza valongi vatombole mikuku ya ambulwilo
Lweza valongi vahake mikingo kumikuku ya ambulwilo
Alweze valongi vatunge mikuku nayisolola ambulwilo
Lweza valongi valumune ambulwilo nakuyitwala muhanjikilo kaha hanjikilo nawa nakuyitwala muambulwilo
learner_steps: Valumune ambulwilo nakuyitwala muhanjikilo kaha hanjikilo nawa nakuyitwala muambulwilo
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Ambulwilo (Indirect speech): Reporting what someone said without using their exact words. Examples: 'Chinyemba ambanga ngwenyi anyinanga muminyau zau.' Converting between direct and indirect speech.

instructional_blocks.hook: Kutemba kuwahilila khana. Lelo nanuka vyakumalaho. Hula valongi valumbunune hanjikiso yakwanuka vyakumalaho.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso nazachiso yatushilikilo
Lweza valongi vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Lweza valongi vatombole tushilikilo twakuzachisa mujila jimwe
Alweze valongi vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
learner_steps: Vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Vatombole jila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Tushilikilo (Idioms) - continued study. Examples: Kuliveta hathulo (to be sleepless - worried), Livoko lyalivwovu (open hand - generous), Kuvatula lyongono namazo (to open eyes and ears - be alert).

sub_topics.short_notes: Language structure covering indirect speech conversion and idiomatic expressions with their cultural meanings.

vocabulary.definition: To be sleepless (idiom for being worried)
To open eyes and ears (idiom for alertness)

questions: Valweze valumune mikuku kufuma mu ambulwilo nakutwala mu hanjikilo

sub_topics.title: KWALUMUNA MUJIMBU - Jijila Jakwalumwinamo
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufumisa mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Longi umwe ahanjike mukuku mulilimi limwe kaha vakwavo valumune uze mukuku mulilimi likwavo.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kweseka najila jakwalumwinamo
Atela kweulula valongi hajijila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
Anukisa valongi kwanuka jila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Translation practice using various methods between English and Luvale.

sub_topics.short_notes: Continued development of translation skills using different methods and techniques.

sub_topics.title: KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA - Shimutwilo: Kulipula Phami

instructional_blocks.hook: Chisemi walunga ikhiye chisemi wamulemu chikuma kuhambaka chisemi waphwevo. Unetavila tahinyi chiku?
teacher_steps: Ahane vihande kuli valongi
Lweza valongi valipule jiphami hamitwe yavihande eyi chipwe yekha mwavahana mulongeshi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Kulipula jiphami (Debate) requires three teams: those supporting the topic (vakakwitavila), those opposing (vakakuhamika), and moderators (vachambamilonga). Format includes opening statements, rebuttals, questions, and closing arguments.

sub_topics.short_notes: This section teaches formal debate structure and skills, including argumentation, rebuttal, and persuasive speaking on various topics.

questions: Valongi valipule jiphami hamitwe yavihande eyi chipwe yekha mwavahana mulongeshi
Example topics: 1. Vakashikola vatela kuvetavisa kuzachisa jishinga. 2. Chisemi waphwevo alema kuhambakana chisemi walunga. 3. Ngonde yavula ikhiko ngonde yamwaza kuhambakana ngonde yachishika.

sub_topics.title: KUTANGA - Mazu: Lumbunwiso yamazu
competences: Valongi vatela kuzachisa mazu akulita naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Chihandwa muka chili mulizu 'mukanda' na 'mukanda'?
teacher_steps: Ahane mazu kuli valongi
Alweze valongi kushimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu navahane
Alweze valongi kulumbununa mazu
Alweze valongi kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila mukutunga mikuku
learner_steps: Vashimutwile mazu akusakula vanavahane kuli mulongeshi
Valongi vatunge mikuku kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Homographs in Luvale - words with same spelling but different meanings. Examples: Mwishi (cook/blacksmith), Mukanda (document/circumcision ceremony), Senge (house/fish), Mbango (house/carrying basket).

instructional_blocks.hook: Mukushinganyeka chenu mwomwo ika va Luvale vazanga kuta tushimutwiji?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mijimbu
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula
Alweze valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi kusononona mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Comprehension passage: KUTANGILA HAPEHO CHAMWAZA KUHAMBAKANA KUTANGILA MUSHIKOLA - Comparing home learning vs school learning in the age of technology. Discusses advantages of each approach.

instructional_blocks.hook: Vatange kamukuku halipapilo.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mikanda yakulisezaseza
Alweza valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange mukuhanjika
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Extensive reading practice with oral summarization.

sub_topics.short_notes: Reading section covering homographs, comparative reading comprehension on modern vs traditional education, and extensive reading.

questions: Kumbulula vihula vyamiyachi yakulihandununa kufuma hamujimbu

sub_topics.title: KUSONEKA - Chaulo chakulipula jiphami

instructional_blocks.hook: Ngonde yanonga yapwa yamwaza kuhambakana ngonde yavula. Unetavila tahinyi wakane?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulipula jiphami
Alweze valongi vasoneke chaulo chakulipula jiphami
learner_steps: Vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulipula jiphami
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Chaulo chakulipula jiphami: Persuasive/argumentative essay supporting one side of a debate topic. Students must have extensive knowledge to support their position and refute opposing views.

sub_topics.short_notes: Persuasive essay writing, teaching students to construct logical arguments with evidence and counterarguments.

questions: Valongi vasoneke chaulo chakulipula jiphami mujila yakwoloka

sub_topics.title: MWAYA LILIMI - Lizukavatu nalizukonda; Vishimo

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mukuku ou halivaya. Kambwandambwanda vanamusumu kuli linokha. Sononona mukuku ou kuputuka na: Linokha………………………………………………….
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune lumbunwiso namulimo walizukavatu nalizukonda
Alweze valongi vahandunune lizukavatu nalizukonda
Alweze valongi vatombole lizukavatu nalizukonda
Lweza valongi vazachise lizukavatu nalizukonda mukutunga mikuku
Lweza valongi valumune mikuku kufumisa mulizukavatu nakutwala mulizukonda chipwe kuyifumisa mulizukonda nakutwala mulizu kavatu
learner_steps: Valumune mikuku kufumisa mulizukavatu nakutwala mulizukonda chipwe kuyifumisa mulizukonda nakutwala mulizu kavatu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Lizukavatu (Active voice): Subject performs action. Example: 'Kawa anunganga phembe' (The dog barks loudly). Lizukonda (Passive voice): Action performed on subject. Example: 'Phembe vamununganga kuli kawa' (Barking is done by the dog).

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi vatongole vishimo vejiva nakuvilumbununa.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso nazachiso yavishimo
Alweze valongi vahandunune vishimo kweseka namilimo yavyo
Alweze valongi vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Alweze valongi vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
learner_steps: Vatombole vishimo vyakwoloka vize vyatela kuzachisa mujila jakulisezaseza
Vatombole jijila jakwoloka jakutela kuzachishilamo vishimo vimwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Vishimo (Similes) - continued practice with figurative comparisons.

sub_topics.short_notes: Grammar covering active and passive voice transformation, and continued work with similes.

vocabulary.definition: Passive voice - action performed on subject

questions: Hula valongi vasoneke mikuku yalizukavatu nalizukonda
Valongi valumune mikuku kuyifumisa mulizukavatu nakuyitwala mulizukonda

sub_topics.title: KWALUMUNA MUJIMBU - Jijila Jakwalumwinamo
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Soneka mukuku mulilimi limwe hali papilo chipwe halivaya mangana valongi vawalumune.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa nge (lizu halizu, kushishisa, mazu akulevana, mazu akulomba, kuyambula)
Shindakanya jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu
learner_steps: Valumune mujimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufuma mu Luvale nakutwala mu English kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa nge (lizu halizu, kushishisa, mazu akulevana, mazu akulomba, kuyambula)
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Continued practice with various translation methods.

sub_topics.short_notes: Translation practice using multiple techniques between English and Luvale.

questions: Valongi valumune mijimbu mwavahana mulongeshi kuzachisa jijila jakulihandununa kufuma mulilimi limwe nakutwala mulilimi likwavo

sub_topics.title: KWIVWILILA NAKUHANJIKA - Myaso Yamakumbi Ano
competences: Kulumbununa ulema wamyaso yachisemwa neyi yamakumbi ano

instructional_blocks.hook: Mwomwo ika myaso yamakumbi ano yapwa yayilemu?
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune ulemu wamyaso yamakumbi ano
Alweze valongi kuhunanana hakutangisa chakufuma kumyaso yamakumbi ano
Alweze valongi vembenga myaso yamakumbi ano
learner_steps: Vahunanane hakutangisa chakufuma kumyaso yamakumbi ano
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Myaso yamakumbi ano (Contemporary songs) convey important messages about current life issues. Importance: teaches important values, encourages recognition of national issues, helps people express feelings, entertains, preserves culture for future generations.

sub_topics.short_notes: This topic explores contemporary Luvale songs, their cultural significance, messages, and role in preserving heritage while addressing modern issues.

questions: Vashimutwile nakulumbununa kulema chamyaso yamakumbi ano
Vahunanane hakutangisa chakufuma kumyaso yamakumbi ano

sub_topics.title: KUTANGA - Mazu: Lumbunwiso Yamazu
competences: Valongi vatela kuzachisa mazu akulita naseteko yavo

instructional_blocks.hook: Kusoneka mazu a esekeso halivaya nakuhula valongi valumbunune.
teacher_steps: Ahane mazu kuli valongi
Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso yamazu navahane
Alweze valongi kwambulula lumbunwiso yamazu
Alweze valongi kuzachisa mazu vanashimutwila kutunga mikuku
learner_steps: Vashimutwile mazu akusakula vanavahane kuli mulongeshi
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Esekeso (Comparisons/Similes): Using 'nge' to compare. Examples: 'Sombo apwa nge mbwanda' (Sombo is like a lion - brave), 'Kusuhwa cha Kayombo nge kahwehwe' (Kayombo's face is like a fox - clever), 'Chipango eji kutambuka nge mulalu' (The airplane flies like lightning - fast).

instructional_blocks.hook: Tanga chimbwa chamujimbu nakulamuna kaha hula valongi vambulule chihande chivene chili muchimbwa unatange.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatange mijimbu yakulisezaseza
Lweza valongi vakumbulule vihula yakulisezaseza
Alweze valongi vahihise mujimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi kusononona mijimbu vanatange
Alweze valongi vashimutwile lumbunwiso yamazu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Reading comprehension: PUHO YA KALIFWO NA KASONGO - Story about two friends who perform contemporary songs and win money at a competition, learning about the value of traditional music.

instructional_blocks.hook: Kusoneka mazu halivaya nakulweza valongi vawatangile helu.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vatangile helu washi-washi nakulamuna
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Fluent reading practice.

sub_topics.short_notes: Reading section covering comparisons/similes, comprehension about contemporary music, and fluent reading.

questions: Vakumbulule vihula vyamiyachi yakulisezaseza kufuma hamujimbu

sub_topics.title: KUSONEKA - Chaulo chakulumbununa

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi valumbunune mulongeshi vazangile chikuma kushikola yavo vapwile nakutangila shimbu kanda vezenga hashikola khana aha.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi vashimutwile walo natuthachikijilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
Alweze valongi kusoneka chaulo chakulumbununa
learner_steps: Vashimutwile walo natuthachikilo twachaulo chakulumbununa vyuma
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Descriptive composition about people. Structure: Chimbwa 1 (Introduction: name, gender, age, country), Chimbwa 2 (Physical description), Chimbwa 3 (School background), Chimbwa 4 (Hobbies), Chimbwa 5 (Conclusion: overall character).

sub_topics.short_notes: Descriptive essay writing about people, reinforcing earlier lessons with focus on structure and sensory details.

sub_topics.title: MWAYA LILIMI - Jinovumo; Tushilikilo

instructional_blocks.hook: Kuhulisa valongi vashimutwile omu veji kusolokanga nge hembo lyavo hali misongo.
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumbunune lumbunwiso yajinovumo
Alweze valongi vatombole jinovumo kweseka namiyachi yajo (ulombo nakupwa chachuma)
Alweze valongi vatunge mikuku kuzachisa miyachi yajinovumo yakulisezaseza
learner_steps: Vatombole jinovumo kweseka namiyachi yajo (ulombo nakupwa chachuma)
Vatunge mikuku kuzachisa miyachi yajinovumo yakulisezaseza
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Jinovumo (Interjections): Words expressing emotion. Types: 1. Vijinovumo vyaulombo (pain/grief): wii, ufuku. 2. Vijinovumo vyakupwa chachuma (happiness/excitement): zwee, ayikhiye.

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi valumbunune mazu awa 'Kukwata mukanwa.'
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi kushimutwila lumbunwiso namilimo yatushilikilo
Alweze valongi vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Alweze valongi vatombole tushilikilo twakuzachisa mujijila jimwe
Alweze valongi vatombole jijila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
learner_steps: Vahake tushilikilo mumazavu kweseka namulimo watwo
Vatombole jijila jakulisezaseza jakuzachishilamo tushilikilo tumwe
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Tushilikilo (Idioms) - final review. Examples: Kutwala kuthunda (to take to thunder - to publish/announce), Kuhaka hamavoko (to put in hands - to arrest).

sub_topics.short_notes: Grammar covering interjections expressing emotions and final review of idiomatic expressions.

vocabulary.definition: To take to thunder (idiom: to publish)
To put in hands (idiom: to arrest)

questions: Valongi vasoneke mikuku kuzachisa miyachi yajinovumo yakulisezaseza

sub_topics.title: KWALUMUNA MUJIMBU - Jijila Jakwalumwinamo
competences: Kuzachisa jijila jakwalumwinamo mijimbu kufuma mu English nakutwala mu Luvale chipwe kufumisa mu Luvale nakutwala mu English

instructional_blocks.hook: Hula valongi valumune mukuku ou kufuma mu English nakuutwala mu Luvale: 'The lion roared very loudly that it was heard in the whole district.'
teacher_steps: Alweze valongi valumune mujimbu kweseka najijila jakwalumwinamo
Atela kweulula valongi hajijila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
Anukisa valongi kwanuka jijila jakwalumwinamo mujimbu
instructional_blocks.short_notes: Final translation practice including word-for-word (lizu halizu) translation techniques.

sub_topics.short_notes: Final translation exercises reinforcing all learned translation methods.

questions: Valongi valumune chimbwa chamazu kweseka najijila jakwalumwinamo jakufwana nge lizu halizu
